passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 1 to 10): Ten word-processing machines when given an input (set of numbers) rearrange them following a particular rule, as given below are giving below ten sets of inputs and the various sequential steps of rearrangement by the ten different machines. You are asked to find out on which machine is working on a logic of shifting or arranging or arithmetical or miscellaneous (Time allotted: 10 seconds per questions)
